title: astragalus toanus var. toanus
intro: Astragalus toanus var. toanus, also known as Toan's milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus toanus var. toanus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and increasing vitality, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus toanus var. toanus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
